isi.lyrics:
Lyric heyden - Love signs

Romanization

shall the win give me signs
about the love we lost?
as the sun starts to rise and
I’m still stuck in time
She never said a word
About the road ahead of us

Early in the morning
The sun starting to rise and
I wonder if I will ever meet her again
But she never told me
about all those goodbyes spoken
I wonder if she’s doing fine without me

I stroll through our old spots
where we used to laugh and play
every step feels like a
heartbeat in my chest
still feel like you are here
Memories that won’t fade away

shall the win give me signs
about the love we lost?
as the sun starts to rise and
I’m still stuck in time
She never said a word
About the road ahead of us

Can the wind give me signs?
I’m still stuck in time
About the path that we could take
I’m still chasing time
Hoping you’re still mine
I’m still hoping for a sign

still feel you in the air
your laughter makes me smile
miss the way we danced all night
letting you go is hard
but I'll keep you in my heart
I guess it’s time to say goodbye.

I stroll through our old spots
where we used to laugh and play
every step, it feels like a
heartbeat in my chest
still feel like you are here
memories that won’t fade away

can the win give me signs
about the love we lost?
as the sun starts to rise and
I’m still stuck in time
she never said a word
about the road ahead of us

can the wind give me signs?
I’m still stuck in time
about the path that we could take
I’m still chasing time
hoping you’re still mine
im still hoping for a sign

Hangeul

노릇하게 구워지는
7시의 하늘은
너무 아름답게
다신 없을 것 같이
이름 모를 사람들은
각자의 가방과
각자의 퇴근 중
내 친구들은 다 어른이 됐나 봐
난 아직도 어린앤데

잘하고 있다고
누가 말해주면
울고 싶은 지금
마음이
나았을까
먹을 걸 좀 사서
집에 들어가면
나의 걱정들도 퇴근하기를

'내일은 더 잘해야지'
텅 빈 혼잣말은
텅 빈 방을 돌아
다시 잔소리같이
이름 모를 사람들의
꺼지지 않는 불
아직도 퇴근 중
내 친구들은 다 어른이 됐나 봐
난 아직도 어린앤데

잘하고 있다고

울고 싶은 지금
마음이
나았을까
먹을 걸 좀 사서
집에 들어가면
나의 걱정들도 퇴근하기를

나도 똑같다고
누가 말해주면
울고 싶은 지금
마음이
나았을까
시간을 확인하고
몇 번 뒤척이면
나의 걱정들도 퇴근하기를
